description: Vital Recorder is open with case 0002.vital loaded, showing an intraoperative recording from a noncardiac surgery at Seoul National University Hospital (VitalDB). As an anesthesiologist assistant completing post-operative documentation, export the complete vital signs recording to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\case_0002_vitals.csv and create a structured anesthetic summary at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\anesthetic_summary_0002.txt. The summary must include the case identification (0002), total recording duration, surgical duration (calculated from 'Surgery started' to 'Surgery finished' events), a list of all monitored physiological parameters, and a brief clinical narrative summarizing the monitoring data and vital signs patterns.
